title: Far Cry® 5

notes: Launches with U-Play overlay disabled. Vehicle Steering works after copying dlls from a Windows 7 installation. https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/2356#issuecomment-480456487 Everything else works perfectly, ~60fps high
title: Far Cry® 5

notes: Vehicle steering fixed! You have to download dinput8.dll and copy to wine windows system32 and syswow64 folders. Dont forget to backup your original file. Link: https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B9fGDj-9F3bJRlVDZEp5TFBaX1U/view

title: Far Cry® 5

notes: The game doesn't launch. It also appears Steam doesn't/Can't install the .NET Framework during the first launch install.
title: Far Cry® 5

notes: Several tricks, including: disable Easy Anti-Cheat, Uplay offline mode, native dinput8. Bronze, because online game is not working. Follow these instructions: https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/2356#issuecomment-505360105
title: Far Cry® 5

notes:
After disabling Easy Anti Cheat as stated & disabling Uplay overlay it was able to run - no multiplayer, no Far Cry Arcade. Also the performance is really bad and if you dare to change some graphics settings while in-game, then the fps get's cut half or worse (from avg 35 to avg 15 FPS on medium settings). Guess DX11 is part of the problem here. 
Maybe Far Cry Arcade would work if someone can successfully install .NET 4.5.2 into the prefix.
title: Far Cry® 5

notes:
As others have said, you need to disable EAC and uplay overlay, start it once in online mode, let it crash, then put uplay in offline mode and you're able to play.

In my case, I had to replace the proton-supplied DXVK version with the newest, otherwise the graphics glitched out (everything way too dark / bright, unplayable).

Performance is pretty good, getting 60-100fps on WQHD with everything on ultra, motion blur off.
title: Far Cry® 5

notes: Bronze because single player works good with workarounds. Online play not working. Requires disabling EAC + offline mode, and disabling uplay overlay. Still can't turn left or right using land based vehicles with M+KB unless using Windows7 dinput8.dll override. Steering works with controller without dll override. Read here for more info on the workarounds needed: https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/2356#issuecomment-507283540
title: Far Cry® 5

notes: Uplay installs and launches fine, but there is no easy way to get the game working without very complicated hex edits and such to dlls to disable Easy Anti Cheat as far as I can tell, which is more time than I'm willing to invest.
title: Far Cry® 5

notes: The game runs perfectly but is a royal pain in the neck to get going. You have to remove EasyAntiCheat (instructions on PC Gaming Wiki) to get it to boot and add the dinput8.dll from Windows 7 to your wineprefix to get vehicle steering with keyboard to work. I installed Uplay through Lutris as I don't have the Steam version of this particular game.
title: Far Cry® 5

notes: Runs quite well once I disabled EAC (hex edit) + disabled Uplay overlay. I also had to grab dinput.dll & dinput8.dll from Windows 8.1 and add a dll override to fix the keyboard/mouse steering. Overall performance is very good most times around 100-120fps on max settings at 1920x1080.
title: Far Cry® 5

notes: Game freezes at starting menu with fsync on works once fsync is disabled, disabled EAC and had trouble capturing my mouse movements unless i used virtual desktop mode.
title: Far Cry® 5

notes: Disabling Uplay and it's anticheat system made the game playable. The only things that need some fixing are steering cars and fishing. Cars can only go forwards or backwards; every other function seems to work just fine. You can't turn while you're casting a fishing line. You have to jump to be able to reel the line. And, you can't reel the line when a fish takes the bait. Everything else seems to work just fine though.
title: Far Cry® 5
